creator: rabe@uugrn.org
text: There are some new Locations and URLs on UUGRN's entry in www/share/sgml/usergroups.xml: New entry: Unix Users Group Rhein-Neckar e.V. (UUGRN e.V.) http://www.uugrn.org/ The Unix Users Group Rhein-Neckar e.V. (UUGRN e.V.) provides a regional forum for users of all Unix flavors, with a stress on Linux and BSD. Meetings are held on the third Monday of each month in Heidelberg. The FIXME meeting happens every first Friday of each month in RaumZeitLabor in Mannheim. Located in Germany, Rhine-Neckar-Region. Fix: This patch updates: * regular meetings ("Unix Stammtisch") now in Heidelberg * "FIXME" meetings now in RaumZeitLabor in Mannheim * New Baseurl for Rhine-Neckar-Wiki
